CONTENT.Career: Vítek played for the under-19 team of Czech club Sigma Olomouc as a 16-year old.On 1 July 2020, Vítek joined Manchester United from Sigma Olomouc.On 25 January 2024, Vítek joined Accrington Stanley on loan until the end of the season.On 27 January 2024 he made his football league debut starting against Forest Green Rovers and keeping a clean sheet in a 1–0 win.

SUMMARY: Radek Vítek (born 24 October 2003) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Manchester United.
